summary: Created technical advice knowledge pack with 4 practical how-to guides for Zoseph: rules vs personas vs skills, debugging scheduled agents, zo.space best practices, and integration patterns. All files under 1500 char limit with YAML frontmatter and concrete UI guidance for non-technical users.
learnings: Technical advice content benefits from decision trees - when to use what tool/approach
Non-technical users need specific UI directions (Settings > Section > Subsection) not generic guidance
Tiny examples work better than long explanations for troubleshooting guides
